title: moregate
description:
a addon to stargate journey that add new stargate variant

 fork of aspect_xero moregates addon for stargate journey
body:
this mod add new stargate variant for the mod stargate journey.
*_for the people who don't know what is the variant system, it let you use crystals named "variant crystal" to change the colors and the sounds of your stargate._

this is one of the added stargate variants : ![brass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6530eac743098eab0cc7fd9bc0baf14338c2a661.jpeg)

*this is a fork of the mod moregates addon from espact_xero :
![approvement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5927de1f92d9447f2a7c99420eb684cdc7be1db6.png)

[this is the link to the original mod (1.20.1 forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/moregates/version/1.1.0)                                                                     
the original mod variants are in this mod.

the mod is still in devloppement so there will be alot of changes.

curently added variants :
- brass (milkyway) [create]
- forest (milkyway)
- jungle (milkyway)
- flesh (milkyway) [biomancy polls]

- electikosian (pegasus)
- quartz (pegasus)

- end (tollan) [named t_end in game]


if you wonder why there is no universe gate, i wasn't thinking about them, it's the only reason.


have fun :)
